Idiomatic Expressions

  • 黄师宪嘉兆 - Title suggesting a story or record about Huang Shixian, possibly indicating auspicious signs or predictions.
  • 林开三命世俗日者多托其书以自衒然初未覩厥真也 - Complex phrase containing several idiomatic elements. '林开三命' refers to Lin Kai's commentary on the 'Sanming' (Three Destinies), a text related to fate and destiny. '世俗日者' refers to fortune-tellers in general. '托其书以自衒' means to rely on the book to show off or promote themselves. '然初未覩厥真也' means that initially, they did not see the true essence of the text.
  • 长子方龆龀立于傍亦漫令谈休咎 - '长子方龆龀' means his eldest son was still a child. '立于傍' means standing by his side. '亦漫令谈休咎' means he casually asked him to talk about good or bad omens.
  • 林曰此兄科名逺胜君至究竟处但只相似耳 - '林曰' means Lin said. '此兄科名逺胜君' means this brother's academic achievements far surpass yours. '至究竟处但只相似耳' means in the end, they are just similar.
  • 其后至一终于朝奉郎长子者师宪也状元及第然亦至郎官而止 - '其后至一终于朝奉郎' means later, Huang Zhiyi ended up as a Cao Feng Lang (a low-ranking official). '长子者师宪也' means his eldest son was Huang Shixian. '状元及第' means he became the top scholar in the imperial examination. '然亦至郎官而止' means but he also only reached the rank of Langguan (an official position).
  • 师宪初发乡举时以绍兴五年试南宫既出院梦题院门曰依旧家山万里重新场室三年是嵗本中优选以误用韵牓罢八年遂冠省闱以无廷对擢居正奏第一 - '师宪初发乡举时' means when Huang Shixian first took the local examination. '以绍兴五年试南宫' means in the fifth year of the Shaoxing era, he took the imperial examination. '既出院梦题院门曰依旧家山万里重新场室三年' means after leaving the examination hall, he dreamed of writing on the door of the hall, saying, 'Still the distant mountains of home, the examination hall is renewed after three years.' '是嵗本中优选以误用韵牓罢' means in that year, he was supposed to be selected as the top candidate but was disqualified due to a mistake in the rhyme. '八年遂冠省闱以无廷对擢居正奏第一' means eight years later, he topped the provincial examination and was promoted to the top position without a palace examination.
  • 先是其伯父梦神人告曰君家有此双名士天下流传第一人又隣人王氏梦其居挂金书牓曰状元坊自谓子孙必应兆每夸语于里闾久而益贫遂货于黄氏不数年师宪捷书来初命名时盖慕东汉隐君子鼻祖叔度之为人已而年夀才止于四十八与叔度同 - '先是其伯父梦神人告曰' means earlier, his uncle had a dream where a divine person told him. '君家有此双名士天下流传第一人' means your family has two famous scholars, the first in the world. '又隣人王氏梦其居挂金书牓曰状元坊' means another neighbor, Wang, had a dream where his house was hung with a golden plaque saying 'Zhuangyuan Fang' (Top Scholar's Lane). '自谓子孙必应兆' means he believed his descendants would surely fulfill this prophecy. '每夸语于里闾久而益贫遂货于黄氏' means he often boasted about it in the village, but over time, he became poorer and sold the land to the Huang family. '不数年师宪捷书来' means not long after, news of Huang Shixian's success came. '初命名时盖慕东汉隐君子鼻祖叔度之为人' means when he was first named, it was in admiration of the character of Shudu, the ancestor of the reclusive gentlemen of the Eastern Han Dynasty. '已而年夀才止于四十八与叔度同' means but his lifespan was only 48 years, the same as Shudu.

  • 谓李请谨行之 - Ambiguous phrase; could mean 'telling Li to be careful and follow it' or 'advising Li to act with caution.'
  • 又询其人伦之学 - Meaning 'further inquiring about the study of human relationships.' '人伦' refers to the relationships and duties between people, especially in the context of Confucian ethics.

  • 指鸡欲买僧靳之未遽从丐 - Literal translation: 'Pointing to a chicken and wanting to buy it, the monk hesitated and did not immediately agree to the beggar.' Describes a hesitant action and refusal.
  • 此鸡或是吃毒虫得病既已暴死不宜留 - Literal translation: 'This chicken might have eaten poisonous insects and died suddenly, so it should not be kept.' Explains the reason for the refusal.
  • 幸有见钱七文愿付我使暂一知肉味亦师之赐也 - Literal translation: 'Fortunately, I have seven coins; I wish to give them to me so that I can taste meat once, which is also a gift from the teacher.' Expresses a request and gratitude.

I believe the chicken transformed into an old woman who appeared in a dream, asking for a different departure. Many such cases are recorded in various records, and this section with the beggar adds a unique twist.' Describes a dream and its interpretation.
  • 芜湖王氏痴女 - Literal translation: 'The foolish daughter of the Wang family in Wuhu.' Introduces a new character and setting.

  • 始犹饮酒食肉自若 - Means 'at first, he continued drinking and eating as usual,' suggesting a lack of concern or awareness.

  • 亦不与他人语 - Means 'he also did not speak to others,' indicating social withdrawal.

  • 医巫在前莫知为何等祟孽 - Means 'doctors and sorcerers were present but did not know what kind of evil spirit was causing the illness.'
  • 唯母忧之 - Means 'only his mother was worried about him,' indicating her concern.
  • 病逾月竟不起 - Means 'the illness lasted over a month before he finally died,' indicating the duration and outcome.
